message:
perf(tools): pre-allocate Vec/HashMap with capacity hints on hot paths (br-15dv.4.2)

- messaging.rs: size recipient Vecs from to/cc/bcc lengths, attachment
  Vecs from attachment_paths count, patterns_by_agent from reservation count
- resources.rs: size unread_counts from agents.len(), thread/outbox
  message Vecs from rows.len(), stale_reasons from constant 4
- console.rs: size visible_indices from events.len(), table rows from
  viewport height, Map::with_capacity for JSON mask, String hints for
  JSON highlight parsing
- search.rs: size participants/mentions/code_references from rows.len(),
  multi-thread aggregate Vecs from thread count
- contacts.rs: size agent_names from outgoing_rows.len()
- products.rs: size search results/inbox items from known bounds
- tracking.rs: size to_dict pairs Vec and Map from per_table.len()
- timestamps.rs: add #[inline] hints on hot-path conversion functions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
